Account settings: User profile and 2FA, account registration and KYC, billing cycles, payments, expenses, VAT, trial conditions, user roles and IAM, permanent API tokens, Gcore MCP Server installation and integration with Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and MCP Inspector, service notifications, support response times, status page subscriptions.
CDN: CDN resources for site, static asset, and video acceleration; origins, origin groups, origin shielding, SSL/SNI; CMS integrations (WordPress, Drupal, Magento, Joomla, AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage); caching rules, cache key, sharding, stale-on-error; secure tokens, country/IP/referrer/user-agent access policies, TLS versions; Gzip and Brotli compression; HTTP headers and CORS; image optimization (WebP, AVIF, resize, crop); rules and templates; Grafana statistics; BYOIP, dedicated IP, prefetch, logs uploader, Let's Encrypt and custom SSL certificates; Terraform provider; troubleshooting status codes, redirects, cache hit ratio; Video CDN for HLS, MPEG-DASH, FLV with secure tokens.
FastEdge: Serverless WebAssembly applications at edge for HTTP and CDN extensions; Rust SDK, JavaScript SDK, Proxy-Wasm; deploy and manage apps, templates, Secrets Manager with slot-based rotation, Edge Storage (key-value, Sorted Set, Bloom Filter); FastEdge CLI for local development; troubleshooting via status codes 530, 531, 532, 533.
Edge Cloud: Virtual Machines (Standard, GPU, CPU, Memory, High-frequency, Basic, TPM, Network-optimized) and Bare Metal servers across global regions; networking with private/public/dedicated networks, subnets, routers, floating/reserved/virtual IPs, BYOIP; Load Balancers with TLS, mTLS, SNI, Prometheus monitoring; NFS file shares; Managed Kubernetes on VM or Bare Metal with autoscaling and OpenID Connect; volumes (High IOPS SSD, Standard, SSD Low-Latency), snapshots, images; advanced DDoS protection for Bare Metal; placement groups; projects, user roles, quotas, tags, billing.
Edge AI: GPU clusters (Bare Metal, Spot Bare Metal, Virtual GPU) with H200, H100, A100, L40S nodes and InfiniBand or Ethernet networking for LLM training and distributed AI/ML workloads; Everywhere Inference for deploying trained models on edge with anycast endpoints and smart routing, Docker containers, vLLM, Diffusers, container image registries, API keys, and quotas.
Gclaw: Managed OpenClaw AI agent service with built-in Kimi K2.5 inference; launch dedicated agent instances, connect Telegram and Discord bots, manage instance lifecycle (restart, backup, restore, recreate), configure external API keys for skills, security model, model and rate limits, pricing.
Managed DNS: Authoritative DNS zones with AnycastDNS, DNSSEC, and healthchecks for failover; managed records A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV, CAA, PTR, SOA, SPF, and HTTPS; zone import and export in BIND format, CNAME flattening at zone apex; dynamic responses with GeoDistance, Weighted shuffle, ASN, Country, Continent, Region, and IP pickers; CDN integration; Terraform provider, OctoDNS secondary DNS, Let's Encrypt issuance via Certbot.
Hosting: Dedicated physical servers (Intel Xeon E3) and KVM virtual servers (KVM-SSD, KVM-SAS, KVM-HIGHCPU); manage via DCImanager, IPMI, and VMmanager 6 control panels; install Linux (CentOS, Debian, Ubuntu, FreeBSD) or Windows Server from templates or custom ISO; connect via RDP, SSH, or VNC; additional IPv4/IPv6 addresses, VLAN, 10 Gbps NICs, PTR records; statistics; troubleshooting suspended servers, ping and packet loss, IP blacklists, ISO installation, IPMI, SSH connectivity.
Object Storage: S3-compatible storage (S3 Standard, S3 Fast) and SFTP storage; create buckets, manage objects via Customer Portal or AWS CLI, S3cmd, AWS JavaScript SDK, FileZilla; bucket lifecycle policies, ACLs, presigned URLs; S3 endpoints and region names (s-ndp1, s-ndlo, s-ed1, s-drc2); SSH keys for SFTP; use storage as CDN origin; billing tiers; 4xx error troubleshooting.
Video Streaming: Live broadcasting via RTMP, RTMPS, SRT, WebRTC WHIP and VOD with transcoding to HLS, DASH, MP4, AES-128 encryption; low-latency LL-HLS and LL-DASH (~2-5s); DVR pause and rewind, multicamera, HTML overlays, recording, restream to YouTube/Facebook/Twitch; broadcasting software (FFmpeg, GStreamer, Larix, OBS); built-in web player and JS Video Player SDK; custom CDN delivery with secure tokens and auto-refresh; AI services for caption generation and translation in 100+ languages, content moderation (NSFW, hard/soft nudity, sport detection); view and live stream statistics.
DDoS protection: Basic (null-routing) and Advanced (TMS on-demand or always-on) DDoS mitigation for networks and servers; GRE tunneling with BGP routing, ACL rules, custom protection profiles including Minecraft and Counter-Strike protocol-aware templates; Super Transit anycast network with GRE for L3/L4/L7 attack mitigation; DDoS events log, Gcore Radar attack methodology reports.
Edge Proxy: Network-layer DDoS protection on Gcore CDN edge with Anycast IP addresses and PoP-based traffic filtering; configure TCP/UDP applications and origin endpoints for game servers and backend services; translation rules between Anycast endpoints and origins.
WAAP: Web Application and API Protection with WAF policies (OWASP Top 10, Behavioral WAF, CMS protection for WordPress/MODX/Drupal), bot management (Known Bots, Anti-automation, Invalid User-Agent), API Discovery and protection with reserved tags and base path configuration, custom and advanced rules using CEL expressions with Allow/Block/CAPTCHA/JS Challenge/Tag actions, rate limiting, IP firewall and IP Reputation, L7 DDoS protection, Threat Intelligence (Security Insights, IP Spotlight), custom response pages, analytics dashboard with traffic and event metrics, troubleshooting blocked users and 5xx errors.
